case_title: BETH H KELLMAN VS. THOMAS FRYE

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY THOMAS FRYE IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT INSISTS ON SERVICE OF PROCESS. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED DEC-09-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRYE, THOMAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLMAN, BETH H RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRYE, THOMAS $4,999.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,064.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FRYE, THOMAS HEARING SET FOR MAR-04-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.00 FILED BY KELLMAN, BETH H AS TO DEFENDANT FRYE, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLMAN, BETH H AS TO DEFENDANT FRYE, THOMAS
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
